description: Protect editorial subjects from aggressive center crops across automatic Edge, browser and VPS worker renderers.
deploymentOrder: run npm run ci, secret scanner, npm audit and deno check for process-news
publish the frontend from the same commit
pull the same commit and restart the worker on the VPS
observe only naturally generated new Feed and Reel items
rollback: Redeploy process-news, frontend and VPS worker from the previous commit; no database rollback is required.
